resume_offer_text: Interrupted run detected — .df-setup-state.json found (no .ai-kit-manifest.json, so this is a genuine resume, not a completed install). Checkpoint shows phases 0 -> 0.5 -> 1 -> 2 -> 2.5 -> 3 complete: 28 files written, all present on disk and verified intact. Recorded decisions: ide_scope=claude-code, MATURITY_TIER=Starter, preset none, Phase 4 flagged skippable. Choose: 1. Resume — re-read the 28 written files (never regenerate), rejoin at Phase 4. 2. Clean restart — delete the outputs + the checkpoint, begin fresh at Phase 0. Which? (resume / clean-restart)

operator_consultations.question: Resume the interrupted run vs clean restart? (resume / clean-restart)

orchestrator_correction: the run-control wrapper's segment-1 stop condition was carried verbatim into segment 2 and wrongly halted the agent at the Phase 3->4 boundary; the orchestrator lifted it in a continuation message. Run-control error, not a generator defect.
